name: Cheesy Tortilla Wedges
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded low-fat Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Brush both sides of each tortilla with olive oil.
3. Place the oiled tortillas on a baking sheet and bake for 3 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Turn the tortillas over; top with an even layer of the shredded cheddar and Monterey Jack cheeses, green chiles, and black olives.
5. Return the tortillas to the oven and bake for an additional 3 minutes or until the cheese melts.
6. Using a sharp knife, cut each tortilla into six wedges.
7. Arrange the wedges on a serving platter and top with guacamole.
12 servings / Serving size: 1/2 of a corn tortilla (3 wedges) with 1 tablespoon guacamole
Exchanges:
- Fat Exchange -- 1 Medium-Fat Meat Exchange -- 1 Starch Exchange -- 1/2 Calorie Exchange
